allow: PowerShell(cd "d:\\ReactPlayground\\CatchTheFish"; $env:NODE_OPTIONS="--dns-result-order=ipv4first"; npm install --save-dev webpack-cli@5 webpack-dev-server@4 babel-loader@9 --legacy-peer-deps 2>&1)

PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -First 1; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc -Force; Write-Host "Killed PID $proc" } else { Write-Host "Nothing on port 3000" })

PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -First 1; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc -Force; Write-Host "Killed PID $proc" } else { Write-Host "Port 3001 is free" })

PowerShell(@\(3000, 3001\) | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -First 1; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; "Killed PID $p on port $_" } })

PowerShell($p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -First 1; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; "Killed PID $p" } else { "Port 8080 free" })

PowerShell(Copy-Item "D:\\ReactPlayground\\CatchTheFish\\assets\\Eating Fish Sprite sheet\\Eating Fish Sprite sheet\\Eating Fish-02\\Eating Fish Animation.png" "D:\\ReactPlayground\\CatchTheFish\\assets\\eating-anim.png")
